title: Gymnopteris punctata
taxonomy: Gymnopteris punctata is a species of fern that belongs to the family Lomariopsidaceae. This classification places it within the order Polypodiales, which includes a variety of fern species. The family Lomariopsidaceae is further grouped under the subclass Polypodiidae, a subcategory within the class Polypodiopsida. The class Polypodiopsida is part of the division Pteridophyta, which includes all ferns. Gymnopteris punctata's classification reflects its evolutionary position among other fern species.
